page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.4xlarge is a storage-optimized server instance within the ecs.d3s family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.7 GHz. The instance provides 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, indicating a one-to-one mapping with no hyperthreading enabled. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

A defining characteristic of this server is its massive local storage capacity, offering 95,348 GB of HDD storage. This high-density local storage is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. The absence of GPU hardware and the reliance on mechanical HDD storage rather than solid-state drives represents a specific tradeoff, prioritizing raw storage volume and sequential capacity over high-IOPS random access performance.

Given these hardware specifications, the ecs.d3s.4xlarge is highly suited for storage-intensive workloads that require large capacities of local data retention. Typical deployment scenarios include big data processing, distributed file systems, data warehousing, and large-scale log archiving where sequential read and write operations dominate.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.4xlarge is a storage-focused server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, providing a dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading. The system is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, offering a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. Its most prominent feature is the inclusion of 95,348 GB of local HDD storage, making it a high-density storage option. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. Lacking a GPU and utilizing HDD instead of SSD storage, this instance is optimized for cost-effective, high-capacity sequential data storage rather than low-latency random I/O. It is best suited for big data analytics, distributed file systems, and large-scale data archiving workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.4xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, 25 Gbps network bandwidth, and an extensive 95,348 GB of local HDD storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d3s.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 95,348 GB of local HDD storage for massive data workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing and ninety-five terabytes of local HDD storage for data-intensive workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core

Optimized for big data, distributed file systems, and archiving
